query: SELECT id, title, shortDescription, coverImageUrl, image1 FROM experiences WHERE title LIKE '%Pass%' OR title LIKE '%Pack%' OR title LIKE '%Team%' OR title LIKE '%Nayade%' ORDER BY title LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute SELECT id, title, shortDescription, coverImageUrl, image1 FROM experiences WHERE title LIKE '%Pass%' OR title LIKE '%Pack%' OR title LIKE '%Team%' OR title LIKE '%Nayade%' ORDER BY title LIMIT 20;
